_meta.note: Only integration_ready entries whose bytes match their sha256 AND whose withheld component gates each resolve to a tagged glTF node are copied. A model that declares default_hidden geometry it cannot address is refused: the app would otherwise draw what the manifest says to hide.

runtime_policy.enable_glb_when: feature flag on, close zoom, mercator projection, chapter gate open
runtime_policy.globe_policy: transparent fallback; do not apply a naive mercator model matrix on globe
runtime_policy.node_gate_policy: read component_id, reveal_chapter, gate_confidence, and default_hidden from glTF node extras
runtime_policy.ship_motion_owner: atlas runtime; preview proxy is excluded from GLB

chapter_beats.status: proposed; exact waterfall climb beats need human verification

runtime_policy.enable_glb_when: feature flag on, close zoom, supported projection, and chapter gate open
runtime_policy.globe_policy: use only after photographed globe proof; otherwise retain transparent fallback
runtime_policy.node_gate_policy: read component_id, reveal_chapter, gate_confidence, default_hidden, and verified state windows from glTF extras
runtime_policy.animation_policy: sample named clips from chapter-entry elapsed time; MapLibre/app state owns the clock and reduced-motion freeze
